channel.title: Text Preprocessing on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Text Preprocessing on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: NLP Part 1: Introduction and Text Preprocessing
item.description: Every time you ask Claude a question, autocomplete a sentence in Gmail, or read a Google Translate page, you are touching a stack that took seventy years to assemble. Natural Language Processing is the discipline that taught machines to read, score, transform, and write human language – and the surprising thing is how much of the modern stack still rests on a small set of preprocessing primitives invented decades ago.
